description_long: This helmet features a sleek, glossy black exterior with a smooth, rounded shape that fully encloses the head. The front is distinguished by two rows of small, circular ventilation holes running horizontally across the face area, and three large, elongated cutouts at the mouth and chin region for additional airflow. A single, thin red line curves asymmetrically across the left side of the face, adding a striking visual accent. The surface is highly reflective, with subtle texturing visible under light. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from a hard, durable plastic or composite material, likely with a padded interior for comfort. No visible branding or logos are present, and the design is modern and minimalistic with a touch of abstract styling.
description: A glossy black full-face helmet with small circular vents, large mouth cutouts, and a distinctive red line accent on the left side. The design is modern, minimal, and highly reflective.
description_view_0: The left side of the helmet, showing the curved red line accent and the smooth, glossy black surface with subtle texture.
description_view_1: The front view reveals two rows of small circular vents across the face, three large mouth cutouts, and the red line accent on the left.
description_view_2: The right side of the helmet, which is plain and glossy black with no visible accents or vents.
description_view_3: The rear view, showing the helmet's smooth, rounded back with no visible vents or markings.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two horizontal rows of small circular vents across the face and three large elongated cutouts at the mouth/chin area.
attribute_graphic_design: Glossy black with a single thin red curved line on the left side; minimalistic and abstract design.
